title: GrowGeneration (GRWG) Stock Forecast & Price Targets
text: GrowGeneration Stock Analysis and Forecast. Current Price Target Consensus: Average price target around $2-3.50 per share. Price Target Range: Low $1.50-2.27, High $4-4.20. Analyst Ratings: Mix of Buy, Hold, Sell ratings with recent focus on turnaround progress. Stock Performance: Down significantly from 2021 highs reflecting cannabis industry and company challenges. Valuation: Trading at depressed multiples due to turnaround phase. Growth Outlook: Analysts project modest revenue growth with path to profitability. Key Drivers: Proprietary brand expansion (targeting 40%). Cost reduction execution. Market stabilization. Balance sheet strength (zero debt). Investment Thesis: Speculative turnaround story with improving operational metrics. Profitability inflection point approaching. Cannabis industry stabilization key catalyst.
